name: Hamsadhwani
notes: Janya of Mechakalyani (65th melakarta); audava raga (5 notes, no Madhyama or Dhaivata); ārohana S R2 G3 P N3 S, avarohana S N3 P G3 R2 S; evokes brightness, auspiciousness, and joy; a favourite opening raga for concerts; best known for Dikshitar's 'Vatapi Ganapatim' and the jalajAksha varnam of Maanambuchaavadi Venkatasubbaiyer
